# Getting Support for AI Triage & Discussion Helper

Thank you for choosing AI Triage to manage your open-source projects! If you need help, encounter a bug, or want to propose a feature, here is the best way to do so.

## How to Report a Bug
If you've noticed AI Triage acting strangely, falling into a loop, or failing to authenticate:
1. Ensure you are using the latest `uses: LautaroOrellano/ai-triage@v1` tag.
2. Check your GitHub Actions logs for exactly which step crashed.
3. Open a bug report in our [Issue Tracker](../../issues). Please include your `.yaml` configuration to speed up debugging.

## Questions & Community Support
If you have doubts about how the internal Google Gemini Prompt works, or how to tune the `delay-minutes`, please avoid opening an Issue. 
Instead, join our [Community Discussions](../../discussions) where maintainers and other users can share their setups and tips.

## Security Vulnerabilities
If you discover a sensitive security vulnerability (such as a flaw in how GitHub tokens are passed to the container), **do not report it publicly via Issues**. 
Instead, please review our [Security Policy](SECURITY.md) (if present) or directly contact the maintainers via private communication channels first to allow for a responsible patch.

## Business Inquiries & Maintainer Contact
This project is actively maintained. For professional support, integrations, or feedback reaching the maintainer directly, feel free to interact via the official GitHub repository contacts or reach out directly to **@LautaroOrellano**.
